top_signals.title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
top_signals.summary: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI is making crypto security cheaper, faster and harder to ignore
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Australian sugar producer works to restore operations as ransomware group claims attack
top_signals.summary: Mackay Sugar said it was "working urgently" to verify claims that a highly active ransomware group was behind a cyberattack that shut down harvesting and milling operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
top_signals.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
